title: Plumblink Knysna wins Best of Plumbing Company
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Plumblink is proud to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Plumblink is proud to announce that its Knysna store has been named the winner of the prestigious Best of Knysna & Plett Readers’ Choice Awards 2025 – Best Plumbing Company award.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Plumblink is proud to announce that its Knysna store has been named the winner of the prestigious Best of Knysna & Plett Readers’ Choice Awards 2025 – Best Plumbing Company award."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This recognition highlights Plumblink’s dedication to providing top-quality plumbing products and exceptional customer service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are honoured to receive this award,” said Jacques Bruwer, Area Manager at Plumblink. “It’s a testament to the hard work and passion of our Knysna team. Their commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction is what sets us apart.”","html":"“We are honoured to receive this award,” said Jacques Bruwer, Area Manager at Plumblink. “It’s a testament to the hard work and passion of our Knysna team. Their commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction is what sets us apart.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plumblink Knysna serves both professional plumbers and DIY enthusiasts with a wide range of reliable plumbing solutions. The store stocks leading house brands including Plumline, Brassman, Copperman, Viscosity, and Masco, and is the exclusive stockist of Genebre.","html":"Plumblink Knysna serves both professional plumbers and DIY enthusiasts with a wide range of reliable plumbing solutions. The store stocks leading house brands including Plumline, Brassman, Copperman, Viscosity, and Masco, and is the exclusive stockist of Genebre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With a strong national presence, Plumblink continues to support communities across South Africa. The Knysna team remains committed to delivering expert advice, quality products, and a positive in-store experience.","html":"With a strong national presence, Plumblink continues to support communities across South Africa. The Knysna team remains committed to delivering expert advice, quality products, and a positive in-store experience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Customers are invited to visit the Knysna store to explore Plumblink’s extensive product range and experience award-winning service firsthand.","html":"Customers are invited to visit the Knysna store to explore Plumblink’s extensive product range and experience award-winning service firsthand."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, visit www.plumblink.co.za.","html":"For more information, visit www.plumblink.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Plumblink Knysna wins Best of Plumbing Company
